## Meeting Purpose

[Interviewing Caroline Carlson for an Account Executive role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Caroline's sales career progressed from high-volume SDR (Houzz) to quality-focused BDR (WorkRamp) and AE, gaining experience with tech and healthcare buyers.](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [She is seeking a role with more strategic ownership, having found her recent AE position at Common Room too "robotic" and prescriptive.](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Caroline's core sales philosophy is to act as an educator, aligning solutions to specific business problems and building authentic relationships.](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
  - [Tyler will recommend Caroline for the next round; the team's key concern is her ability to close large deals at scale, which she must address in the next interview and mock call.](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=2640.0)

## Topics

### Caroline's Sales Career & Motivation

  - [**Career Path:**](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
      - [**SDR:** Houzz (high-volume) → WorkRamp (quality-focused, piloted inbound team).](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
      - [**AE:** WorkRamp (SMB/commercial) → Blue Sight (healthcare) → Common Room (AI tech).](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [**Motivation for Leaving Common Room:**](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
      - [Seeking a role with more strategic ownership and less "robotic" process.](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
      - [Prefers a sales environment that allows for authentic, individual strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)

### Sales Philosophy & Tactics

  - [**Core Philosophy:** Act as an educator, not a salesperson.](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
      - [Align solutions to specific business problems, connecting them to high-level initiatives to secure C-suite buy-in.](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
  - [**Outbound Tactic:** Use timely, relevant hooks to drive engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
      - [**Example:** A World Series-themed campaign offering a hat if a local team lost.](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Creates a fun, human connection that stands out from generic outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
  - [**Deal Management:** Build authentic relationships throughout the cycle.](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
      - [**Example (Common Room):** Created dedicated Slack channels for trial customers to provide real-time value (e.g., sending leads, relevant collateral).](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)

### Case Study: Blue Sight Health System Deal

  - [**Context:** A self-sourced deal at Blue Sight, an LA health system the company had long pursued.](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [**Land & Expand Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=1850.0)
      - [**Land:** $80k initial deal for one product at one hospital.](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=1850.0)
      - [**Expand:** \~$400k total revenue from full suite adoption across three hospitals.](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=1850.0)
  - [**Key Success Factors:**](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
      - [**Relationship Building:** On-site visits were critical for building trust and getting key stakeholders in a room.](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
      - [**Partnership Framing:** Positioned Blue Sight as a full partner, not just a vendor, which was more appealing than competitors' cheaper, less comprehensive solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)
  - [**Self-Assessment:** Rated personal performance 7.5/10.](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=2081.0)
      - [**Improvement Area:** Should have pursued a full system-wide deal from the start, involving colleagues earlier to present the complete solution suite.](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=1930.0)

### GrowthX Context & Hiring Need

  - [**GrowthX Environment:** High-inbound model driven by founder Marcel's reputation.](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [**Founding AE Experience (Tyler):**](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=2247.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Operating without a playbook, requiring significant process-building (e.g., legal, case studies) while closing large deals.](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=2326.0)
      - [**Solution:** Relying on authentic conversation and the company's strong story to close deals.](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=2405.0)
  - [**Hiring Need:** The team is expanding from one to three AEs to increase capacity and build out the sales infrastructure.](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Recommend Caroline for the next interview round.](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=2690.0)
  - [**Caroline:** Interview with Bridget (VP of Ops), then complete a mock call if advanced.](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=2760.0)
  - [**Caroline:** In the next steps, demonstrate the ability to close large deals at scale and connect the product to a prospect's challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/7iKZWvWyCWu_wFLaJz3RH4wk8fJ5Hf9C?tab=summary&timestamp=2744.0)
